comment: The playable movement kit: the base state machine ⊕ enabled verb overlays. A designer assembles a kit by editing this file (which base, which verbs). Composition is kit overlay (docs/decisions/movement-substrate.md §2, §5); both the interpreter (live) and the compiler (regen) consume the SAME composed kit. Adding a verb here is the entire wiring — no engine code change. The remaining backlog verbs (air burst, charge, wormhole, teleport, aim, wall-cling) are authorable the same way: drop a movement/verbs/<verb>.kit.json and add it to this list.
